block.header: kimi ga yuki ke nagaku narinu yamatadune mukape ka yukamu mati ni ka matamu
kaku bakari kwopwitutu arazupa takayama no ipane si makite sinamasi monowo
aritutu mo kimi woba matamu utinabiku wa ga kurwokami ni simo no oku madeni
aki no ta no po no pe ni kwirapu asagasumi itupye no kata ni wa ga kwopwiyamamu
wiakasite kimi woba matamu nubatamano wa ga kurwokami ni simo pa puru tomo
kimi ga yuki ke nagaku narinu yamataduno mukape wo yukamu mati ni pa matazi
imo ga ipye mo tugite mimasi wo yamato n aru oposima no ne ni ipye mo aramasi wo
imo ga atari tugite mo mimu ni yamato n aru oposima no ne ni ipyeworamasi wo
akiyama no ko no sita kakuri yuku midu no ware koso masame miomopi ywori pa
tamakusige opopu wo yasumi akete yukaba kimi ga na pa aredo wa ga na si wosi mo

sentence.transcription: wa ga na si wosi mo

block.header: tamakusige mimoro no yama no sanakadura sanezupa tupini arikatu masizi
tamakusige mimurwotwoyama no sanakadura sanezupa tupini arikatu masizi

sentence.transcription: sa ne zu pa tupi ni

block.header: ware pa mo ya yasumikwo etari mwinapito no egateni su to pu yasumikwo etari

sentence.transcription: e gate ni su to pu

block.header: mikomokaru sinanwo no mayumi wa ga pikaba umapitosabwite ina to ipamu kamo
mikomokaru sinanwo no mayumi pikazusite wo pakuru waza wo siru to ipanaku ni

sentence.transcription: siru to ipa na ku ni

block.header: adusayumi pikaba manimani yoramedomo noti no kokoro wo sirikatenu kamo
adusayumi turawo toripake piku pito pa noti no kokoro wo siru pito so piku
adumato no nosaki no pakwo no ni no wo ni mo imo pa kokoro ni norinikyeru kamo
tamakadura mwi naranu kwi ni pa tipayaburu kamwi so tuku to pu naranu kwi gotoni

sentence.transcription: mwi nara nu kwi ni pa

block.header: tamakadura pana nomwi sakite narazaru pa ta ga kwopwi ni arame a pa kwopwimopu wo

sentence.transcription: ta ga kwopwi ni ara me

block.header: wa ga satwo ni opoyuki pureri opopara no purinisi satwo ni puramaku pa noti
wa ga woka no okami ni ipite purasimesi yuki no kudakesi soko ni tirikyemu
wa ga sekwo wo yamato pye yaru to saywo pukete akatokituyu ni ware tati nuresi
putari yukedo yukisugwikataki akiyama wo ikani ka kimi ga pitori kwoyu ramu
asipikwino yama no siduku ni imo matu to ware tati nurenu yama no siduku ni
a wo matu to kimi ga nurekyemu asipikwino yama no siduku ni naramasi monowo
opobuneno tumori ga ura ni noramu to pa masasini sirite wa ga putari nesi

sentence.transcription: wa ga puta ri ne si

block.header: oponakwo wo wotikata nwopye ni karu kaya no tuka no apida mo ware wasureme ya
inisipye ni kwopuru tori ka mo yudurupa no miwi no upe ywori nakiwatariyuku
inisipye ni kwopu ramu tori pa pototogisu kedasi ya nakisi wa ga mopyeru goto

sentence.transcription: wa ga mop ye ru goto

block.header: miyosinwo no tamamatu ga ye pa pasiki kamo kimi ga mikoto wo motite kaywopaku
aki no ta no pomuki no yoreru kotoyori ni kimi ni yorinana kotitakari tomo
okurewite kwopwitutu arazupa opisikamu miti no kumamwi ni sime yupye wa ga se
pitogoto wo sigemi kotitami ono ga yo ni imada wataranu asakapa wataru
masurawo ya katakwopwi semu to nagekedomo sikono masurawo napo kwopwinikyeri
nagekitutu masurawonokwo no kwopure koso wa ga yupu kami no pitite nurekyere
yosinwogapa yuku se no payami simasiku mo yodomu koto naku arikosenu kamo
wagimokwo ni kwopwitutu arazupa akipagwi no sakite tirinuru pana ni aramasi wo
yupu saraba sipo mitikinamu suminoye no asakanoura ni tamamo karitena
opobune no paturu tomari no tayutapi ni monomopi yasenu pito no kwo yuweni
takeba nure takaneba nagaki imo ga kami ko no koro minu ni kakiretu ramu ka

sentence.transcription: ko no koro mi nu ni

block.header: pito mwina pa ima pa nagasi to takye to ipedo kimi ga misi kami midaretari tomo
tatibana no kage pumu miti no yatimata ni mono wo so omopu imo ni apazusite
miyabwiwo to ware pa kikyeru wo yadwo kasazu ware wo kapyeseri osono miyabwiwo

sentence.transcription: ware pa kik ye ru wo

block.header: miyabwiwo ni ware pa arikyeri yadwo kasazu kapyesisi ware zo miyabwiwo ni pa aru
wa ga kikisi mimi ni yoku niru asi no ure no asi piku wa ga se tutwometabu besi
purinisi omina nisite ya kaku bakari kwopwi ni sidumamu tawarapa no goto
purinisi omina nisite ya kwopwi wo dani sinobwikanetemu tawarapa no goto
nipunokapa se pa watarazute yukuyukuto kwopwiitaki wa ga se idekaywopikone

sentence.transcription: kwopwi ita ki wa ga se

block.header: ipami no umi tunwo no uramwi wo ura nasi to pito koso mi rame kata nasi to pito koso mi rame yosiweyasi ura pa naku tomo yosiweyasi kata pa naku tomo isanatori umipye wo sasite nikitadu no ariswo no upe ni kaawonaru tamamo okitumo asapapuru kaze koso yoseme yupupapuru nami koso kiyose nami no muta ka yori kaku yoru tamamo nasu yorinesi imo wo tuyusimono okite si kureba ko no miti no yaswokuma gotoni yorodutabi kapyerimi suredo iya toponi satwo pa sakarinu iya takani yama mo kwoyekinu natukusano omopisinayete sinwopu ramu imo ga kadwo mimu nabikye ko no yama

ipami no umi tunwo no uramwi wo ura nasi to pito koso mi rame iswo nasi to pito koso mi rame yosiweyasi ura pa naku tomo yosiweyasi iswo pa naku tomo isanatori umipye wo sasite nikitadu no ariswo no upe ni kaawonaru tamamo okitumo asapapuru kaze koso yoseme yupupapuru nami koso kiyose nami no muta ka yori kaku yoru pasikiyosi imo ga tamoto wo tuyusimono okite si kureba ko no miti no yaswokuma gotoni yorodutabi kapyerimi suredo iya toponi satwo pa sakarinu iya takani yama mo kwoyekinu natukusano omopisinayete sinwopu ramu imo ga kadwo mimu nabikye ko no yama
ipami no ya takatunwoyama no konoma ywori wa ga puru swode wo imo mitu ramu ka
sasa no pa pa miyama mo sayani midaru tomo ware pa imo omopu wakarekinureba
ipami ni aru takatunwoyama no konoma yu mo wa ga swode puru wo imo mikyemu kamo

tunwosapapu ipami no umi no kotosapyeku karanosaki n aru ikuri ni so pukamiru opuru ariswo ni so tamamo pa opuru tamamo nasu nabiki nesi kwo wo pukamiruno pukamete omopedo sanesi ywo pa ikuda mo arazu papututano wakare si kureba kimomukapu kokoro wo itami omopitutu kapyerimi suredo opobuneno watarinoyama no momitiba no tirinomagapi ni imo ga swode sayani mo miyezu tumagomoru yakami no yama no kumoma ywori watarapu tukwi no wosikyedomo kakurwopikureba amatutapu iripi sasinure masurawo to omopyeru ware mo sikitapeno koromo no swode pa toporite nurenu

sentence.transcription: saya ni mo mi ye zu

block.header: tunwosapapu ipami no umi no kotosapyeku karanosaki n aru ikuri ni so pukamiru opuru ariswo ni so tamamo pa opuru tamamo nasu nabiki nesi kwo wo pukamiruno pukamete omopedo sanesi ywo pa ikuda mo arazu papututano wakare si kureba kimomukapu kokoro wo itami omopitutu kapyerimi suredo opobuneno watarinoyama no momitiba no tirinomagapi ni imo ga swode sayani mo miyezu tumagomoru murwokamiyama no kumoma ywori watarapu tukwi no wosikyedomo kakurwopikureba amatutapu iripi sasinure masurawo to omopyeru ware mo sikitapeno koromo no swode pa toporite nurenu

sentence.transcription: saya ni mo mi ye zu

block.header: awokwoma no agaki wo payami kumowi ni so imo ga atari wo sugwite kinikyeru
awokwoma no agaki wo payami kumowi ni so imo ga atari pa kakurikinikyeru
akiyama ni oturu momitiba simasiku pa na tirimagapi so imo ga atari mimu
akiyama ni oturu momitiba simasiku pa tiri na magapi so imo ga atari mimu

ipami no umi tu no ura wo nami ura nasi to pito koso mi rame kata nasi to pito koso mi rame yosiweyasi ura pa naku tomo yosiweyasi kata pa naku tomo isanatori umibye wo sasite nikitadu no ariswo no upe ni kaawonaru tamamo okitumo akekureba nami koso kiyose yupu sareba kaze koso kiyose nami no muta ka yori kaku yoru tamamo nasu nabiki wa ga nesi sikitape no imo ga tamoto wo tuyusimono okite si kureba ko no miti no yaswokuma gotoni yorodutabi kapyerimi suredo iya toponi satwo sakarikinu iya takani yama mo kwoyekinu pasikiyasi wa ga tuma no kwo ga natukusano omopisinayete nageku ramu tunwo no satwo mimu nabikye ko no yama

sentence.transcription: tu no ura wo na mi
wa ga tuma no kwo ga

block.header: ipami no umi ututa no yama no konoma ywori wa ga puru swode wo imo mitu ramu ka
na omopi to kimi pa ipedomo apamu toki itu to sirite ka wa ga kwopwizaramu
ipasiro no pamamatu ga ye wo pikimusubi masakiku araba mata kapyerimimu
ipye ni areba ke ni moru ipi wo kusamakura tabi ni si areba sipi no pa ni moru
ipasiro no kwisi no matu ga ye musubikyemu pito pa kapyerite mata mikyemu kamo
ipasiro no nwonaka ni tateru musubimatu kokoro mo tokezu inisipye omopoyu
amagakeri arigaywopitutu mi ramedomo pito koso sirane matu pa siru ramu
noti mimu to kimi ga musubyeru ipasiro no kwomatu ga ure wo mata mikyemu kamo
ama no para purisakemireba opokimi no miinoti pa nagaku amatarasitari
awopatano kopata no upe wo kaywopu to pa me ni pa miredomo tadani apanu kamo
pito pa yosi omopiyamu tomo tamakadura kage ni miyetutu wasurayenu kamo
utusemi si kamwi ni apeneba sakariwite asa nageku kimi sakariwite wa ga kwopuru kimi tama naraba te ni makimotite kinu naraba nuku toki mo naku wa ga kwopuru kimi so kizo no ywo ime ni miyeturu
kakaramu no kokoro siriseba opomipune patesi tomari ni sime yupamasi wo
yasumisisi wa go opokimi no opomipune mati ka kwopu ramu siga no karasaki
isanatori apuminoumi wo oki sakete kogikitaru pune pye tukite kogikuru pune oki tu kai itaku na pane so pye tu kai itaku na pane so wakakusano tuma no omopu tori tatu
sasanami no opoyamamori pa ta ga tame ka yama ni sime yupu kimi mo aranaku ni

sentence.transcription: kimi mo ara na ku ni

block.header: yasumisisi wa go opokimi no kasikwoki ya mipaka tukapuru yamasina no kagaminoyama ni yworu pa mo ywo no kotogoto piru pa mo pi no kotogoto ne nomwi wo nakitutu arite ya momosikwino opomiyapito pa yukiwakarenamu
mimoro no kamwi no kamusugwi 已具耳 矣自得見監乍共 inenu ywo zo opoki

sentence.transcription: i ne nu ywo zo opo ki

block.header: miwayama no yamapye maswoyupu mizikayupu kaku nomwi yuweni nagasi to omopiki
yamabuki no tatiyosopitaru yamasimidu kumi ni yukamedo miti no siranaku

yasumisisi wa go opokimi no yupu sareba myesitamapu rasi ake kureba twopitamapu rasi kamiwoka no yama no momiti wo kyepu mo ka mo twopitamapamasi asu mo ka mo myesitamapamasi so no yama wo purisakemitutu yupu sareba ayani kanasibwi akekureba urasabwikurasi aratape no koromo no swode pa puru toki mo nasi
moyuru pwi mo torite tutumite pukurwo ni pa iru to ipazu ya omo siranaku mo
kitayama ni tanabiku kumo no awokumo no posi sakariyuki tukwi wo sakarite

asuka no kiywomiparanomiya ni ame no sita sirasimyesisi yasumisisi wa go opokimi takaterasu pinomikwo ikasamani omoposimyese ka kamukazeno isenokuni pa okitumo mo nabikisi nami ni sipoke nomwi kaworeru kuni ni umakori ayani tomosiki takaterasu pinomikwo
kamukazeno isenokuni ni mo aramasi wo nani si ka kikyemu kimi mo aranaku ni

sentence.transcription: na ni si ka ki kye mu

block.header: mimaku pori wa ga suru kimi mo aranaku ni nani si ka kikyemu uma tukaruru ni

sentence.transcription: na ni si ka ki kye mu

block.header: utusomino pito ni aru ware ya asu ywori pa putakamiyama wo irose to wa ga mimu

sentence.transcription: iro se to wa ga mi mu

block.header: iswo no upe ni opuru asibi wo taworamedo misu beki kimi ga ari to ipanaku ni

ametuti no pazime no toki pisakatano ama no kapara ni yapoyorodutiyorodu kamwi no kamutudwopi tudwopiimasite kamupakari pakarisi toki ni amaterasu pirumye no mikoto ame woba sirasimyesu to asipara no midupo no kuni wo ametuti no yoriapi no kipami sirasimyesu kamwi no mikoto to amakumo no yapye kakiwakite kamukudasi imasematurisi takaterasu pinomikwo pa tobutorino kiywominomiya ni kamunagara putwosikimasite sumyeroki no sikimasu kuni to ama no para ipatwo wo piraki kamuagari agariimasinu wa go opokimi mikwo no mikoto no ame no sita sirasimyesiseba parupanano taputwokaramu to motidukwi no tatapasikyemu to ame no sita yomo no pito no opobuneno omopitanomite ama tu midu apugite matu ni ikasamani omoposimyese ka ture mo naki mayuminowoka ni miyabasira putwosikiimasi miaraka wo takasirimasite asa gotoni mikoto twopasanu pitukwi no maneku narinuru soko yuweni mikwo no miyapito yukupye sirazu mo

ametuti no pazime no toki pisakatano ama no kapara ni yapoyorodutiyorodu kamwi no kamutudwopi tudwopiimasi kamupakari pakarisi toki ni sasinoboru pirumye no mikoto ame woba sirasimyesu to asipara no midupo no kuni wo ametuti no yoriapi no kipami sirasimyesu kamwi no mikoto to amakumo no yapyekumo wakite kamukudasi imasematurisi takaterasu pinomikwo pa tobutorino kiywominomiya ni kamunagara putwosikimasite sumyeroki no sikimasu kuni to ama no para ipatwo wo piraki kamunobori imasinisikaba wa go opokimi mikwo no mikoto no ame no sita sirasimyesiseba parupanano taputwokaramu to motidukwi no tatapasikyemu to wosu kuni yomo no pito no opobuneno omopitanomite ama tu midu apugite matu ni ikasamani omoposimyese ka ture mo naki mayuminowoka ni miyabasira putwosikiimasi miaraka wo takasirimasite asa gotoni mikoto twopasanu pitukwi no maneku narinuru sasutakeno mikwo no miyapito yukupye sirani su
pisakatano ame miru gotoku apugimisi mikwo no mikadwo no aremaku wosi mo
akanesasu pi pa teraseredo nubatamano ywo wataru tukwi no kakuraku wosi mo
simanomiya magarinoike no panatidori pitome ni kwopwite ike ni kadukazu
takapikaru wa ga pinomikwo no yoroduyo ni kuni sirasamasi simanomiya pa mo

sentence.transcription: wa ga pi no mikwo no

block.header: simanomiya kaminoike n aru panatidori arabwi na yuki so kimi masazu tomo
takapikaru wa ga pinomikwo no imasiseba sima no mikadwo pa arazu aramasi wo

sentence.transcription: wa ga pi no mi kwo no

block.header: yoso ni misi mayuminowoka mo kimi maseba tokotu mikadwo to tonowi suru kamo
ime ni dani mizarisi monowo opoposiku miyade mo suru ka sapinokuma mwi wo
ametuti to tomoni wopemu to omopitutu tukapematurisi kokoro tagapinu
asapi teru sada no wokapye ni murewitutu wa ga naku namita yamu toki mo nasi
mitatasi no sima wo miru toki nipatadumi nagaruru namita tome zo kaneturu
tatibana no simanomiya ni pa akane ka mo sada no wokapye ni tonowi si ni yuku

sentence.transcription: sa da no woka pye ni

block.header: mitatasi no sima wo mo ipye to sumu tori mo arabwi na yuki so tosi kaparu made
mitatasi no sima no ariswo wo ima mireba opwizarisi kusa opwinikyeru kamo
togura tate kapisi kari no kwo su tatinaba mayuminowoka ni tobikapyerikone
wa ga mikadwo tiyo tokotobani sakayemu to omopite arisi ware si kanasi mo
pimugasi no tagi no mikadwo ni samorapedo kinopu mo kyepu mo myesu koto mo nasi
midu tutapu iswo no uramwi no ipatutuzi moku saku miti wo mata minamu kamo
pitopi ni pa titabi mawirisi pimugasi no opoki mikadwo wo irikatenu kamo
ture mo naki sada no wokapye ni kapyeriwiba sima no mipasi ni tare ka sumapamu
asagumori pi no irinureba mitatasi no sima ni oriwite nagekituru kamo
asapi teru sima no mikadwo ni opoposiku pitooto mo seneba mauraganasi mo
makwibasira putwoki kokoro pa arisikado ko no wa ga kokoro sidumekanetu mo
kekoromo wo parupuyu makete idemasisi uda no oponwo pa omopoyemu kamo
asapi teru sada no wokapye ni naku tori no ywo nakikapyerapu ko no tosikoro wo
patakwora ga yworupiru to ipazu yuku miti wo ware pa kotogoto miyadi ni zo suru

tobutorino asukanokapa no kami tu se ni opuru tamamo pa simo tu se ni nagarepurabapu tamamo nasu ka yori kaku yori nabikapisi tuma no mikoto no tatanaduku nikipada sura wo turugitati mwi ni swope neneba nubatamano ywotoko mo aru ramu soko yuweni nagusamekanete kedasiku mo apu ya to omopite tamadareno wotinooponwo no asatuyu ni tamamo pa piduti yupugwiri ni koromo pa nurete kusamakura tabine ka mo suru apanu kimi yuwe

sentence.transcription: tabi ne ka mo su ru

block.header: tobutorino asukanokapa no kami tu se ni opuru tamamo pa simo tu se ni nagarepurabapu tamamo nasu ka yori kaku yori nabikapisi tuma no mikoto no tatanaduku nikipada sura wo turugitati mwi ni swope neneba nubatamano ywotoko mo arenamu soko yuweni nagusamekanete kedasiku mo kimi mo apu ya to tamadareno wotinooponwo no asatuyu ni tamamo pa piduti yupugwiri ni koromo pa nurete kusamakura tabine ka mo suru apanu kimi yuwe

sentence.transcription: ywo toko mo are na mu
tabi ne ka mo su ru

block.header: sikitapeno swode kapesi kimi tamadareno wotinwo sugwiyuku mata mo apame ya mo

sentence.transcription: mata mo apa me ya mo

block.header: sikitapeno swode kapesi kimi tamadareno wotinwo ni sugwinu mata mo apame ya mo

sentence.transcription: mata mo apa me ya mo

block.header: tobutorino asukanokapa no kami tu se ni ipapasi watasi simo tu se ni utipasi watasu ipapasi ni opwinabikyeru tamamo mo zo tayureba opuru utipasi ni opwiwoworeru kapamo mo zo karureba payuru nani si ka mo wa ga opokimi no tataseba tamamo no mokoro koyaseba kapamo no gotoku nabikapisi yorosiki kimi ga asamiya wo wasuretamapu ya yupumiya wo somukitamapu ya utusomi to omopisi toki parubye pa pana wori kazasi aki tateba momitiba kazasi sikitapeno swode tadusapari kagami nasu miredomo akazu motidukwi no iya medurasimi omoposisi kimi to tokidoki idemasite aswobitamapisi mikemukapu kwinope no miya wo tokomiya to sadametamapite adisapapu mekoto mo tayenu sikare ka mo ayani kanasimi nuyedorino katakwopwiduma asatorino kaywopasu kimi ga natukusano omopisinayete yuputuduno ka yuki kaku yuki opobuneno tayutapu mireba nagusamuru kokoro mo aranu soko yuweni semu subye sire ya oto nomwi mo na nomwi mo tayezu ametutino iya toponagaku sinwopiyukamu mina ni kakaseru asukagapa yoroduyo madeni pasiki ya si wa go opokimi no katami ka koko wo

sentence.transcription: mi na ni kaka s eru

block.header: tobutorino asukanokapa no kami tu se ni ipanami watasi simo tu se ni utipasi watasu ipanami ni opwinabikyeru tamamo mo zo tayureba opuru utipasi ni opwiwoworeru kapamo mo zo karureba payuru nani si ka mo wa ga opokimi no tataseba tamamo no mokoro koyaseba kapamo no gotoku nabikapisi yorosiki kimi ga asamiya wo wasuretamapu ya yupumiya wo somukitamapu ya utusomi to omopisi toki parubye pa pana wori kazasi aki tateba momitiba kazasi sikitapeno swode tadusapari kagami nasu miredomo akazu motidukwi no iya medurasimi omoposisi kimi to tokidoki idemasite aswobitamapisi mikemukapu kwinope no miya wo tokomiya to sadametamapite adisapapu mekoto mo tayenu soko wo si mo ayani kanasimi nuyedorino katakwopwi situtu asagwirino kaywopasu kimi ga natukusano omopisinayete yuputuduno ka yuki kaku yuki opobuneno tayutapu mireba nagusamuru kokoro mo aranu soko yuweni semu subye sire ya oto nomwi mo na nomwi mo tayezu ametutino iya toponagaku sinwopiyukamu mina ni kakaseru asukagapa yoroduyo madeni pasiki ya si wa go opokimi no katami ka koko wo

sentence.transcription: mi na ni kaka s eru

block.header: asukagapa sigarami watasi sekamaseba nagaruru midu mo nodoni ka aramasi
asukagapa sigarami watasi sekamaseba nagaruru midu no yodo ni ka aramasi
asukagapa asu dani mimu to omope ya mo wa go opokimi no mina wasure senu
asukagapa asu sape mimu to omope kamo wa go opokimi no mina wasurayenu

kakemaku mo yuyusiki kamo ipamaku mo ayani kasikwoki asuka no makamwinopara ni pisakatano ama tu mikadwo wo kasikwoku mo sadametamapite kamusabu to ipagakurimasu yasumisisi wa go opokimi no kikosimyesu sotomo no kuni no makwi tatu pupayama kwoyete komaturugi wazamigapara no karimiya ni amoriimasite ame no sita wosametamapi wosu kuni wo sadametamapu to toriganaku aduma no kuni no miikusa wo myesitamapite tipayaburu pito wo yapase to maturwopanu kuni wo wosame to mikwonagara maketamapeba opomimwi ni tati toriobasi opomite ni yumi torimotasi miikusa wo adomopitamapi totonopuru tudumi no oto pa ikaduti no oto to kiku made pukinaseru kuda no oto mo ata mitaru twora ka poyuru to moropito no obiyuru madeni sasagetaru pata no nabiki pa puyugomori paru sarikureba nwo gotoni tukite aru pwi no kaze no muta nabiku ga gotoku torimoteru yupazu no sawaki miyuki puru puyu no payasi ni tumuzi ka mo imakiwataru to omopu made kiki no kasikwoku pikipanatu ya no sigekyeku opoyuki no midaretekitare maturwopazu tatimukapisi mo tuyusimono kenaba kenu beku yuku tori no araswopu pasi ni watarapi no itukinomiya yu kamukaze ni ipukimatwopasi amakumo wo pi no me mo misezu tokoyamwi ni opopitamapite sadametesi midupo no kuni wo kamunagara putwosikimasite yasumisisi wa go opokimi no ame no sita mawositamapeba yoroduyo ni sika si mo aramu to yupubana no sakayuru toki ni wa go opokimi mikwo no mikadwo wo kamumiya ni yosopimaturite tukapasisi mikadwo no pito mo sirwotapeno asagoromo kite paniyasu no mikadwo no para ni akanesasu pi no kotogoto sisizimono ipapipusitutu nubatamano yupupye ni nareba opotono wo purisakemitutu uduranasu ipapimotopori samorapedo samorapieneba parutorino samaywopinureba nageki mo imada sugwinu ni omopi mo imada tukwineba kotosapyeku kudaranopara yu kamupaburi paburiimasite asamoyosi kwinope no miya wo tokomiya to takaku maturite kamunagara sidumarimasinu sikaredomo wa go opokimi no yoroduyo to omoposimyesite tukurasisi kaguyama no miya yoroduyo ni sugwimu to omope ya ame no goto purisakemitutu tamatasuki kakete sinwopamu kasikwokaredomo

sentence.transcription: so t omo no kuni no
ke na ba ke nu be ku
pi no me mo mise zu
sika si mo ara mu to

block.header: kakemaku mo yuyusikyeredomo ipamaku mo ayani kasikwoki asuka no makamwinopara ni pisakatano ama tu mikadwo wo kasikwoku mo sadametamapite kamusabu to ipagakurimasu yasumisisi wa go opokimi no kikosimyesu sotomo no kuni no makwi tatu pupayama kwoyete komaturugi wazamigapara no karimiya ni amoriimasite ame no sita parapitamapite wosu kuni wo sadametamapu to toriganaku aduma no kuni no miikusa wo myesitamapite tipayaburu pito wo yapase to maturwopanu kuni wo parapye to mikwonagara maketamapeba opomimwi ni tati toriobasi opomite ni yumi torimotasi miikusa wo adomopitamapi totonopuru tudumi no oto pa ikaduti no oto to kiku made pukinaseru puye no oto pa ata mitaru twora ka poyuru to moropito no kikimatwopu made sasagetaru pata no nabiki pa puyugomori parunwo yaku pwi no kaze no muta nabiku ga gotoku torimoteru yupazu no sawaki miyuki puru yupu no payasi ni tumuzi ka mo imakiwataru to moropito no mimatwopu madeni pikipanatu ya no sigekyeku arare nasu soti yorikureba maturwopazu tatimukapisi mo asasimo no kenaba ke to pu ni utusemi to araswopu pasi ni watarapi no itukinomiya yu kamukaze ni ipukimatwopasi amakumo wo pi no me mo misezu tokoyamwi ni opopitamapite sadametesi midupo no kuni wo kamunagara putwosikimasite yasumisisi wa go opokimi no ame no sita mawositamapeba yoroduyo ni kaku si mo aramu to yupubana no sakayuru toki ni sasutakeno mikwo no mikadwo wo kamumiya ni yosopimaturite tukapasisi mikadwo no pito mo sirwotapeno asagoromo kite paniyasu no mikadwo no para ni akanesasu pi no kotogoto sisizimono ipapipusitutu nubatamano yupupye ni nareba opotono wo purisakemitutu uduranasu ipapimotopori samorapedo samorapieneba parutorino samaywopinureba nageki mo imada sugwinu ni omopi mo imada tukwineba kotosapyeku kudaranopara yu kamupaburi paburiimasite asamoyosi kwinope no miya wo tokomiya to takaku maturite kamunagara sidumarimasinu sikaredomo wa go opokimi no yoroduyo to omoposimyesite tukurasisi kaguyama no miya yoroduyo ni sugwimu to omope ya ame no goto purisakemitutu tamatasuki kakete sinwopamu kasikwokaredomo

sentence.transcription: so t omo no kuni no
ke naba ke to pu ni
pi no me mo mise zu
kaku si mo ara mu to

block.header: pisakatano ame sirasinuru kimi yuweni pitukwi mo sirazu kwopwiwataru kamo
paniyasu no ike no tutumi no komorinuno yukupye wo sirani toneri pa matwopu
nakisapa no mori ni miwa suwe inoredomo wa go opokimi pa takapi sirasinu
puru yuki pa apani na puri so yonabari no wikapi no woka no samukaramaku ni

yasumisisi wa go opokimi takapikaru pinomikwo pisakatano ama tu miya ni kamunagara kamwi to imaseba soko wo si mo ayani kasikwomi piru pa mo pi no kotogoto yworu pa mo ywo no kotogoto pusiwi nagekedo akidaranu kamo
opokimi pa kamwi ni si maseba amakumo no ipopye ga sita ni kakuritamapinu

sentence.transcription: i po pye ga sita ni

block.header: sasanami no siga sazarenami sikusikuni tune ni to kimi ga omoposerikyeru

amatobuya karu no miti pa wagimokwo ga satwo ni si areba nemokoroni mimaku posikyedo yamazu yukaba pitome wo opomi maneku yukaba pito sirinu bemi sanekadura noti mo apamu to opobune no omopitanomite tamakagiru ipakakiputi no komori nomwi kwopwitutu aru ni wataru pi no kureyuku ga goto teru tukwi no kumogakuru goto okitumono nabikisi imo pa momitiba no sugwite iniki to tamadusano tukapi no ipeba adusayumi oto ni kikite ipamu subye semu subye sirani oto nomwi wo kikite arieneba wa ga kwopuru tipye no pitopye mo nagusamuru kokoro mo ari ya to wagimokwo ga yamazu ide misi karu no iti ni wa ga tatikikeba tamatasuki unebwinoyama ni naku tori no kowe mo kikoyezu tamapokono miti yuku pito mo pitori dani nitesi yukaneba subye wo nami imo ga na ywobite swode zo purituru

sentence.transcription: ti pye no pito pye mo

block.header: amatobuya karu no miti pa wagimokwo ga satwo ni si areba nemokoroni mimaku posikyedo yamazu yukaba pitome wo opomi maneku yukaba pito sirinu bemi sanekadura noti mo apamu to opobune no omopitanomite tamakagiru ipakakiputi no komori nomwi kwopwitutu aru ni wataru pi no kureyuku ga goto teru tukwi no kumogakuru goto okitumono nabikisi imo pa momitiba no sugwite iniki to tamadusano tukapi no ipeba adusayumi oto nomwi kikite ipamu subye semu subye sirani na nomwi wo kikite arieneba wa ga kwopuru tipye no pitopye mo nagusamuru kokoro mo ari ya to wagimokwo ga yamazu ide misi karu no iti ni wa ga tatikikeba tamatasuki unebwinoyama ni naku tori no kowe mo kikoyezu tamapokono miti yuku pito mo pitori dani nitesi yukaneba subye wo nami imo ga na ywobite swode zo purituru

sentence.transcription: ti pye no pito pye mo

block.header: akiyama no momiti wo sigemi matwopinuru imo wo motomemu yamadi sirazu mo
akiyama no momiti wo sigemi matwopinuru imo wo motomemu miti sirazusite
momitiba no tiriyuku napeni tamadusano tukapi wo mireba apisi pi omopoyu

utusemi to omopisi toki ni torimotite wa ga putari misi pasiride no tutumi ni tateru tukwi no kwi no kotigoti no ye no paru no pa no sigeki ga gotoku omopyerisi imo ni pa aredo tanomyerisi kwora ni pa aredo yononaka wo somuki si eneba kagirwopwi no moyuru aranwo ni sirwotapeno amapire gakuri torizimono asadatiimasite iripi nasu kakurinisikaba wagimokwo ga katami ni okyeru midorikwo no kopinaku gotoni toriatapuru mono si nakyereba wotokwozimono wakibasami moti wagimokwo to putari wa ga nesi makuraduku tumaya no uti ni piru pa mo urasabwikurasi yworu pa mo ikidukiakasi nagekedomo semu subye sirani kwopuredomo apu yosi wo nami opotorino pagapinoyama ni wa ga kwopuru imo pa imasu to pito no ipeba ipane sakumite nadumikosi yokyeku mo zo naki utusemi to omopisi imo ga tamakagiru ponokani dani mo miyenu omopeba

sentence.transcription: wa ga puta ri mi si
puta ri wa ga ne si
yo kyeku mo zo na ki

block.header: utusomi to omopisi toki ni torimotite wa ga putari misi pasiride no tutumi ni tateru tukwi no kwi no kotigoti no ye no paru no pa no sigeki ga gotoku omopyerisi imo ni pa aredo tanomyerisi kwora ni pa aredo yononaka wo somuki si eneba kagirwopwi no moyuru aranwo ni sirwotapeno amapire gakuri torizimono asadatiimasite iripi nasu kakurinisikaba wagimokwo ga katami ni okyeru midorikwo no kopinaku gotoni toriatapuru mono si nakyereba wotokwozimono wakibasami moti wagimokwo to putari wa ga nesi makuraduku tumaya no uti ni piru pa mo urasabwikurasi yworu pa mo ikidukiakasi nagekedomo semu subye sirani kwopuredomo apu yosi wo nami opotorino pagapinoyama ni wa ga kwopuru imo pa imasu to pito no ipeba ipane sakumite nadumikosi yokyeku mo zo naki utusemi to omopisi imo ga tamakagiru ponokani dani mo miyenu omopeba

sentence.transcription: wa ga puta ri mi si
puta ri wa ga ne si
yo kyeku mo zo na ki

block.header: kozo mitesi aki no tukuywo pa teraseredo apimisi imo pa iya tosi sakaru
pusumadiwo pikide no yama ni imo wo okite yamadi wo yukeba ikyeri tomo nasi

utusomi to omopisi toki tadusapete wa ga putari misi idetati no momoye tukwi no kwi kotigoti ni yeda saseru goto paru no pa no sigeki ga gotoku omopyerisi imo ni pa aredo tanomyerisi imo ni pa aredo yononaka wo somuki si eneba kagirwopwi no moyuru aranwo ni sirwotapeno amapire gakuri torizimono asa tati iyukite iripi nasu kakurinisikaba wagimokwo ga katami ni okyeru midorikwo no kopinaku gotoni torimakasuru mono si nakyereba wotokwozimono wakibasami moti wagimokwo to putari wa ga nesi makuraduku tumaya no uti ni piru pa urasabwikurasi yworu pa ikidukiakasi nagekedomo semu subye sirani kwopuredomo apu yosi wo nami opotorino pagapinoyama ni na ga kwopuru imo pa imasu to pito no ipeba ipane sakumite nadumikosi yokyeku mo zo naki utusomi to omopisi imo ga papi nite maseba

sentence.transcription: wa ga puta ri mi si
puta ri wa ga ne si
yo kyeku mo zo na ki

block.header: kozo mitesi aki no tukuywo pa wataredomo apimisi imo pa iya tosi sakaru
pusumadiwo pikide no yama ni imo wo okite yamadi omopu ni ikyeru two mo nasi

sentence.transcription: ik yeru two mo na si

block.header: ipye ni kite wa ga ya wo mireba tamadoko no poka ni mukikyeri imo ga komakura

akiyamano sitapyeru imo naywotake no towoyoru kwora pa ikasamani omopi wore ka takunapano nagaki inoti wo tuyu kosoba asita ni okite yupupye pa kiyu to ipe kwiri kosoba yupupye ni tatite asita pa usu to ipe adusayumi oto kiku ware mo oponi misi koto kuyasiki wo sikitapeno tamakura makite turugitati mwi ni swope nekyemu wakakusano so no tuma no kwo pa sabusimi ka omopite nu ramu kuyasimi ka omopi kwopu ramu toki narazu sugwinisi kwora ga asatuyu no goto yupugwiri no goto

sentence.transcription: mwi ni swope ne kye mu
so no tuma no kwo pa
sugwi ni si kwo ra ga

block.header: sasanami no sigatu no kwora ga makaridi no kapase no miti wo mireba sabusi mo

sentence.transcription: siga tu no kwo ra ga

block.header: sasanami no siganotu no kwo ga makaridi no kapase no miti wo mireba sabusi mo

sentence.transcription: siga no tu no kwo ga

block.header: sworakazwopu opotu no kwo ga apisi pi ni oboni misikaba ima zo kuyasiki

tamamoyosi sanuki no kuni pa kunikara ka miredomo akanu kamukara ka kokoda taputwoki ametuti pitukwi to tomoni tariyukamu kamwi no miomo to tugite kuru naka no minatwo yu pune ukete wa ga kogikureba tokitukaze kumowi ni puku ni oki mireba towinami tati pye mireba siranami sawaku isanatori umi wo kasikwomi yuku pune no kadi pikiworite wotikoti no sima pa opokyedo nagupasi samine no sima no ariswoomo ni iporite mireba nami no to no sigeki pamapye wo sikitapeno makura ni nasite aradoko ni koropusu kimi ga ipye siraba yukite mo tugemu tuma siraba ki mo topamasi wo tamapokono miti dani sirazu opoposiku mati ka kwopu ramu pasiki tumara pa
tuma mo araba tumite tagemasi sami no yama nwo no pe no upagwi sugwinikyerazu ya
oki tu nami kiyoru ariswo wo sikitape no makura to makite naseru kimi kamo
kamoyama no ipane si makyeru ware wo ka mo siranito imo ga matitutu aramu
kyepu kyepu to wa ga matu kimi pa isikapa no kapi ni mazirite ari to ipazu ya mo

sentence.transcription: ari to ipa zu ya mo

block.header: kyepu kyepu to wa ga matu kimi pa isikapa no tani ni mazirite ari to ipazu ya mo

sentence.transcription: ari to ipa zu ya mo

block.header: tadano api pa apikatu masizi isikapa ni kumo tatiwatare mitutu sinwopamu
aranami ni yorikuru tama wo makura ni oki ware koko ni ari to tare ka tugenamu
amazakaru pina no aranwo ni kimi wo okite omopitutu areba ikyeru two mo nasi

sentence.transcription: ik yeru two mo na si

block.header: imo ga na pa tiyo ni nagaremu pimyesima no kwomatu ga ure ni koke musu madeni
nanipagata sipopwi na ari sone siduminisi imo ga sugata wo mimaku kurusi mo

adusayumi te ni torimotite masurawo no satuya tabasami tatimukapu takamatwoyama ni parunwo yaku nwobwi to miru made moyuru pwi wo ikani to twopeba tamapokono miti kuru pito no naku namita kwosame ni purite sirwotapeno koromo pidutite tatitomari ware ni kataraku nani si ka mo motona toburapu kikeba ne nomwi si nakayu katareba kokoro zo itaki sumyeroki no kamwi no mikwo no idemasi no tabwi no pikari so kokoda teritaru
takamatwo no nwopye no akipagwi itadurani saki ka tiru ramu miru pito nasi ni
mikasayama nwopye yuku miti pa kokidaku mo sizini aretaru ka pisaniaranaku ni

sentence.transcription: pisa ni ara na ku ni

block.header: takamatwo no nwopye no akipagwi na tiri sone kimi ga katami ni mitutu sinwopamu
mikasayama nwopye yu yuku miti kokidaku mo arenikyeru kamo pisaniaranaku ni
